div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 842px; margin-left: 357px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Shallow data controller class responsible for hiding the database (Postgres) and storage (MinIO S3) from the rest of the system.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 842px; margin-left: 102px;

div.div:
Deployment of FastAPI wrapper around ONNX model
Replicas scale based on requests/sec controlled by KEDA and in case of canary deployment, Argo Rollout as well.
Responds to user queries and saves data to the database through data controller
